challenges.title: Inline Styles
challenges.description: Create at least two HTML elements with inline style attributes. One element should set a color property, and another should set a font-size property. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert html.lower().count('style=') >= 2, 'Should have at least 2 elements with style attributes'
assert 'color:' in html.lower() or 'color :' in html.lower(), 'Should set a color property in an inline style'
assert 'font-size:' in html.lower() or 'font-size :' in html.lower(), 'Should set a font-size property in an inline style'
hints: Inline styles use the style attribute:

challenges.title: Style Block
challenges.description: Create an HTML page with a <style> element inside the <head> containing at least 2 CSS rules, and a <body> with elements that match those rules. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '<head' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <head> element'
assert '<style' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <style> element'
assert '</style>' in html.lower(), 'Should close the <style> element'
assert '<body' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <body> element'
assert '</body>' in html.lower(), 'Should close the <body> element'
import re
style_content = re.search(r'<style[^>]*>(.*?)</style>', html.lower(), re.DOTALL)
assert style_content, 'Style element should contain CSS rules'
rules = re.findall(r'\{[^}]+\}', style_content.group(1))
assert len(rules) >= 2, 'Should have at least 2 CSS rules in the style block'
hints: CSS rules follow the pattern: selector { property: value; }
Make sure your body contains elements that match your CSS selectors
